title: use $GO env-var instead of hard-coded go binary
body:
Signed-off-by: Lokesh Mandvekar <lsm5@fedoraproject.org>

@baude @mheon PTAL ... Since, there's already a GO envvar in the Makefile, it's best we switch to that wherever we use the go binary. It should also get rid of a command not found notice in https://travis-ci.org/lsm5/libpod/builds/381705630
